tasks.label: run-client-test
tasks.command: cd client && npm run test -- --run > out.txt 2>&1 || true

tasks.label: verify-client-tests
tasks.command: cd client && npm run test -- --run > out.txt 2>&1 || true

tasks.command: cat e2e_out_3.txt > playwright_errors.txt && npx playwright test e2e/auth.spec.js > auth_failed.txt 2>&1 || true
